name: Vintage 70s Corvette Coastal
description: Nostalgic analog film aesthetic with vintage C3 Corvette, coastal sunset, Kodachrome look
input_prompt: woman in bikini standing in vintage corvette door at sunset beach

subject.description: young woman early 20s with sun-kissed tan skin, fit physique, blonde hair with beachy texture

hair.details: wind-swept, past shoulders, soft sunset glow catching highlights

face.gaze: looking off to the side toward horizon, avoiding camera
face.makeup: minimal fresh-faced beach look, natural nude/pink lips

pose_action.position: standing inside open car door frame, elevated on door sill
pose_action.camera_relation: eye-level to slightly low angle, medium shot knees up
pose_action.dynamic_elements: hands resting on car roof frame for support, head turned to profile, body frontal

environment.location: coastal road or beachside parking overlooking ocean

props.details: shark body style, open driver door, T-top removed
props.physics: BFGoodrich Radial T/A white letter tires visible, retro wheel rims

environment.time_of_day: dusk, blue hour transition, late golden hour

subject.description: Young woman early 20s with sun-kissed tan skin, fit physique, blonde wavy beach hair

pose_action.posture: Hands on roof frame, head turned to profile, body frontal

midjourney.prompt: vintage 70s analog photograph, young blonde woman in white bikini standing in open door of white C3 Corvette, coastal sunset overlooking ocean, contemplative expression looking at horizon, Kodachrome film grain, warm golden hour light, soft focus dreamy, scanned photo with white border --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6

ideogram.prompt: Vintage 1970s analog film photograph of young blonde woman in white bikini standing in open door of classic white Corvette C3, coastal road overlooking ocean at sunset, contemplative expression, Kodachrome color palette with film grain, soft focus, white photo border frame

recraft.prompt: Vintage 70s film photograph, blonde woman in white bikini in Corvette door frame, ocean sunset background, Kodachrome colors, film grain, nostalgic summer aesthetic

luma.motion_notes: Gentle hair movement in breeze, subtle ocean wave motion, warm light slowly shifting

reve.prompt: Analog film photography in the style of 1970s Kodachrome summer editorials, young woman in white bikini with vintage C3 Corvette, coastal sunset overlook, nostalgic Americana, film grain and warm color palette

grok-imagine.prompt: Vintage 70s film photo, blonde woman in white bikini standing in classic Corvette door at beach sunset, looking toward ocean horizon, Kodachrome colors with film grain, nostalgic summer vibes

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A vintage late 1970s analog film photograph of a young woman in her early 20s standing in the open driver's door of a classic white C3 Corvette with shark body styling. She has sun-kissed tan skin, a fit physique, and long wavy blonde beach-textured hair that is wind-swept past her shoulders with soft sunset highlights. Her expression is contemplative and serene as she gazes toward the ocean horizon in profile, avoiding the camera. She wears a classic white triangle bikini. The T-top is removed from the Corvette, and BFGoodrich Radial T/A white letter tires with retro wheel rims are visible. The scene is set on a coastal road overlooking deep blue ocean water against a purple-pink sky gradient at dusk during the blue hour transition. Soft diffused sunset side lighting creates warm highlights on her skin and cool ambient shadows. Shot on 35mm Kodachrome film with a 50mm prime lens at f/2.8. Heavy authentic film grain texture, soft analog focus, slight vignette, and a white rough scanned photo border frame. No digital sharpness. No modern elements. Nostalgic 70s Americana aesthetic.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman early 20s sun-kissed tan blonde wavy hair standing in open door of vintage white C3 Corvette, white triangle bikini, contemplative expression looking toward ocean horizon in profile, coastal road overlooking deep blue water purple-pink sunset sky at dusk, BFGoodrich white letter tires visible T-top removed, soft sunset side lighting warm highlights cool shadows, 35mm Kodachrome film grain soft focus vignette white photo border, late 70s nostalgic summer aesthetic, not digital or modern
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A vintage 1970s analog film photograph of a young woman standing in the open driver's door of a classic white C3 Corvette with shark body styling on a coastal road at dusk. She has sun-kissed tan skin, a fit physique, and long wavy blonde wind-swept beach hair catching soft sunset highlights. Her expression is contemplative as she gazes toward the ocean horizon in profile. She wears a classic white triangle bikini. The T-top is removed and BFGoodrich Radial T/A white letter tires are visible. Deep blue ocean water meets a purple-pink gradient sky. Soft diffused sunset side lighting creates warm highlights and cool ambient shadows. Shot on 35mm Kodachrome film with authentic heavy grain, soft analog focus, vignette, and white scanned photo border. Nostalgic late 70s summer aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the Corvette color from white to cherry red while keeping the same C3 shark body style, T-top removed, and BFGoodrich tires. Preserve the woman's pose, bikini, sunset lighting, and vintage Kodachrome film aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed props with car model, tire brand, era-specific details
2_realism_anchors: 'film grain texture', 'Kodachrome color shift', 'scanned photo border'
4_negative_hygiene: excludes digital, modern, HDR aesthetic leaks
5_spatial_consistency: 'standing in door frame', 'hands on roof', clear positioning
6_lighting_storytelling: 'soft sunset side lighting' = nostalgic romantic mood
7_era_authenticity: period-accurate car, styling, and film aesthetic
